clusters.justification: Supported by the amygdala, anterior insula, and broader limbic circuity, this domain captures the macroscopic generation, regulation, and processing of emotional valence, mood, and physiological arousal.

Linked to striatal and ventromedial prefrontal neuroeconomical pathways, this domain unites the appraisal of salient stimuli, reward calculation, and the mapping of incentives to goal-directed behaviors.

Subserved structurally by the default mode network, this domain encompasses internally-directed abstract representations and referential processing regarding oneself, temporal personal history, and others.
